creator: alex@cichlids.com
text:
If a checksum mismatch appears it makes a make FORCE_FETCH=$$file that forces make fetch to refetch
	this one file. If the checksum is ok, it proceeds, if not, it tries to refetch it again as many times
	as set in FETCH_REGET (default to 1). It stops when FETCH_REGET becomes 0 and stops with an error if
	the checksum mismatch still appears.
	It uses fetch -R as default to not-delete the files on broken transfers, so files can be refetched.

Fix: I hope this won´t make problems with the long lines.
